query:
SELECT mrp.*, u.name as participant_name 
FROM meeting_request_participants mrp 
LEFT JOIN users u ON mrp.user_id = u.id 
WHERE mrp.meeting_request_id = (SELECT id FROM meeting_requests ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1);
